assertion_results.text: Output maps ValidationError to 400 Bad Request
assertion_results.evidence: Output states 'ValidationError maps to HTTP 400 with validation details'

assertion_results.text: Output maps InvalidDataError to 422 Unprocessable Entity
assertion_results.evidence: Output states 'InvalidDataError also maps to HTTP 400/422' — ambiguous, does not clearly specify 422 Unprocessable Entity

assertion_results.text: Output states ValidationError belongs in application or infrastructure layers
assertion_results.evidence: Output states ValidationError is 'caught at the application or domain boundary' — 'domain boundary' is not the same as 'application or infrastructure layers' per skill definition

assertion_results.text: Output states InvalidDataError belongs in domain entities, value objects, or builders
assertion_results.evidence: Output says InvalidDataError signals 'a semantic domain violation' but does not explicitly name 'domain entities, value objects, or builders' as the location of use

assertion_results.text: Output clearly distinguishes the two errors by layer and purpose
assertion_results.evidence: Layer assignment is inaccurate (ValidationError at 'domain boundary', InvalidDataError HTTP code ambiguous 400/422); distinction is incomplete and partially incorrect
